raw.objective: “to identify the optimum target dose of PHT and to assess the clinical efficacy of genotyping the CYP2C9*3, CYP2C19*2, and CCYP2C19*3 alleles in Japanese pediatric patients with epilepsy”
raw.covariates: Tested: SEX, WT, VPA, CBZ, PHB, ZNS, CLBZ, TPM, CLNZ, nitrazepam, sulthiame, GBP, LMT, LVT, CYP2C9, CYP2C19 Included: WT, CYP2C9, CCYP2C19, sulthiame
raw.observations: Although the analysis resulted in a simplified PK model (essentially modelling the correlation between dose and clearance), which allowed to individualise treatment. a statistically insignificant improvement in terms of withdrawal from PHT treatment and time to treatment failure was found when compared to conventional dosing, possibly due to a lack of power (n=17 individualised treatment vs n=139 conventional)
raw.equations: ETD = theta1-theta2*log(WT)-theta3 *CYP2C9_3-theta4*CYP2C19_2-theta5*CYP2C19_3-theta6*SULTHIAME ETD is estimated target dose in mg/kg/day CYP2C9_3 is having the CYP2C9*3 genotype (0=no, 1=yes) CYP2C19_2 is having the CYP2C19*2 genotype (0=no, 1=yes) CYP2C19_3 is having the CYP2C19*3 genotype (0=no, 1=yes) SULTHIAME is concomitantly receiving treatment with sulthiame (0=no, 1=yes)
raw.parameter_values: theta1=17.63 theta2=6.94 theta3=2.68 theta4=0.68 theta5=1.06 theta6=1.07

extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “to identify the optimum target dose of PHT and to assess the clinical efficacy of genotyping the CYP2C9*3, CYP2C19*2, and CCYP2C19*3 alleles in Japanese pediatric patients with epilepsy”

covariates.raw: Tested: SEX, WT, VPA, CBZ, PHB, ZNS, CLBZ, TPM, CLNZ, nitrazepam, sulthiame, GBP, LMT, LVT, CYP2C9, CYP2C19 Included: WT, CYP2C9, CCYP2C19, sulthiame

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
